message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flatcar-container-linux-847-stable-3227-2-2-randomly-causes-processes-to-hang-on",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flatcar-container-linux: Stable 3227.2.2 randomly causes processes to hang on I/O related operations",
+    "description": "Stable 3227.2.2 randomly causes processes to hang on I/O related operations. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flatcar-container-linux troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flatcar-container-linux deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flatcar-container-linux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux
kubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux
```
We've seen multiple nodes (different regions and environments) stalling completely (unresponsive kubelets and containerds, journald and timesyncd units failing, no login possible, ...) on the 3227.2.2 release."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Stable 3227.2.2 randomly causes processes to hang on I/O…",
+        "description": "I was not able to repro with the reproducer in my own testing, but an infrastructure VM that we have on the stable channel has also hit this (14 days of uptime, no particular io load):
<details>
<summary>log:</summary>

```
[1282119.153912] INFO: task jbd2/sda9-8:544 blocked for more than 122
```yaml

[291596.792511]       Not tainted 5.15.63-flatcar #1
[291596.797871] "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.

[291596.835508]  ? wb_wait_for_completion+0x25/0x80
[291596.840776]  sync_inodes_sb+0xba/0x2a0
[29
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Stable 3227.2.2 randomly causes processes to hang… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux -n flatcar-container-linux --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I was not able to repro with the reproducer in my own testing, but an infrastructure VM that we have on the stable channel has also hit this (14 days of uptime, no particular io load):
<details>
<summary>log:</summary>

```
[1282119.153912] INFO: task jbd2/sda9-8:544 blocked for more than 122 seconds.",
